title: Across Bridge - Open App
meta_description: across bridge routes you to the official Across app to bridge or swap supported tokens across Ethereum, L2s, Solana, BSC and more.
hero_h2: Move tokens between supported chains in the official app
hero_lead: across bridge sends users to the official Across interface for intent-based cross-chain transfers across supported networks with wallet-confirmed execution.
trust: Supported networks include Ethereum, Base and Solana
what_is: Across is an intent-based cross-chain protocol for moving assets between supported networks through its transfer app and developer APIs. Its developer documentation explains integration paths for swaps, bridge actions and builders.

how.d: Use the primary action to visit the official Across interface and connect a wallet you control.
Select the token, origin network, destination network and amount supported by the app.
Check the destination amount, route details, fees and estimated timing before signing.
Approve token spending if prompted, sign the transaction and monitor transfer status in the app.

points.p: This page sends users to the real Across app instead of simulating transactions or collecting wallet permissions.
Across lists support for Ethereum, Hyperliquid, Base, Solana, BNB Smart Chain and additional networks in its current app ecosystem.
Cross-chain activity carries smart contract, network and user-error risk; ethereum.org gives a neutral overview of bridge trade-offs.

faq.q: Is Across Bridge the official Across app?
faq.a: No. This page is a routing page; use app.across.to for the official transfer interface and verify the domain before connecting.

faq.q: What can I do with Across Bridge?
faq.a: You can route to Across to move supported tokens between supported chains when the official app provides a quote for your route.

faq.q: Do I need a wallet for Across Bridge?
faq.a: Yes. Cross-chain transfers require a compatible self-custody wallet, token balance on the origin chain and gas for the transaction.
No. This landing page does not quote or set fees; review all amounts, route details and network costs inside the official app before signing.
No. Bridges involve smart contract, network and user-error risk; review the ethereum.org bridge overview before transferring significant value.

footer_note: Not the official app; verify the app.across.to domain before connecting. Educational content only, not financial advice.
